CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert F. Cohen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Gary E. Looney, President of Creditors Trade Association, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant U.A. Local 38 Convalescent Trust Fund, a Union Trust Fund, a/k/a Local 38 of the United Association of Plumbers and Pipe Fitters, dba Konocti Harbor Resort & Spa.
Default was entered against defendant on November 4, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 4, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against the Defaulted Defendant U.A. Local 38 Convalescent Trust Fund, a Union Trust Fund, a/k/a Local 38 of the United Association of Plumbers and Pipe Fitters, dba Konocti Harbor Resort & Spa as follows:

Damages/Principal - $42,197.73.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,019.69.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $420.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $43,637.42.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2010 Continued To Mar-12-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
